name: Broccoli and Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can reduced-fat cream of mushroom soup, undiluted (1 3/4-ounce)
1 can reduced-fat cream of chicken soup, undiluted (1 3/4-ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli according to package directions; drain and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add celery and onion, and cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes or until tender. Remove mixture from skillet and set aside.
3. Combine soups and milk in the skillet; cook over medium heat, stirring often, just until thoroughly heated. Stir in cheese spread, melting it completely.
4. Stir in broccoli, celery mixture, rice, chicken, and pepper into a lightly greased 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
